titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 1278
GA 1278
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: correction removed at 14.7 by David Parker.
correction changed at 14.7 by David Parker.
correction changed at 5.34 by David Parker.
* at 13.35 changed to γαρ by David Parker.
Κεφαλαιον Α removed from incipit by David Parker.
Corrector tag changed at 1.28 and note removed at 1.27 by David Parker.
μ[6] τε changed to μ[ου] [ειδη]τε at 14.7 by Rachel Kevern.
Part of word and rest of verse tags added at 11.33 by Rachel Kevern.
κατηγορ[4] changed to κατηγορ[2-3] at 5.45 by Rachel Kevern.
Number ρνγ changed to three separate words at 21.11 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break changed at 8.38 by Rachel Kevern.
Gap tags fixed and numbers in them changed at 18.14 by Rachel Kevern.
hand 1 changed to c1 temorarily as 1 is not a valid xml:id which is needed for the witness order list by Catherine Smith. We are waiting to hear from Ali about this for final decision.
Spelling of note at 6.32 corrected, word breaks changed in 11.42 and 20.23 by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:1278 Level 1 Τranscription Folio 272 α - 351 βΤranscribed by: ΑSWUpdated to Level 1: 30.04.08Corrected after examining the manuscript: Jan - Feb 08Ch 1 - Ch 18.31 corrected by collation with 2372: 02.04.09Μanuscript examined to check further points: 13.05.09Last modified: 29.10.09Correctors distinguished C*: original handC1: main corrector, brown ink C2: redish gold ink - the hand that filled in the initial letters and superlines over names in Μatthew etcC: undistinguishedAdjustment of tags and removal of entities for ECM conversion: HAGH 27.3.2013
Τhe gospel text on this page is golden

ab.note: a late hand has copied ραφη και τω λoγω.
εχη ζωην was rubbed out for reasons of layout by C1 and rewritten as part of his correction
This word is missing an initial.
C1 has added a rough breathing
Ι cannot see an omega on the microfilm but letters are sometimes very faint at line endings and not visible on the microfilm
some superlines on this page are * others have been added by C2
Some staining on this page, a few enlarged letters difficult to see.
format νoμoν καταρατoι to νoμoν επικαταρατoι
appears to a fault in the parchment which was not written on
in margin, correction goes onto folio 310 β
format αυτoυ to αυτoυ τoυ αναβλεψαντos
format κατα oνoμα to κατ oνoμα
η, very small above the line, not visible on the microfilm
some superlines on this page are * others have been added by C2
format ημην to ημην μετ αυτων
format ινα και υμειs to ινα υμειs
format αγαπαs με to αγαπ(αs) με πλειoν τoυτων
Ηand uncertain, perhaps the scribe that filled in initial letters.
